ideation: This sequence mimics the action of carefully taking a baguette from a shelf or table.  The animation will focus on a smooth, controlled movement of one arm, emphasizing the gentle handling of the bread. The other arm will remain in a relaxed, neutral position to maintain balance and draw attention to the action of picking up the baguette.  Frame 1 shows both arms at rest. Frame 2 shows the right arm extending, reaching for the baguette. Frame 3 shows the right arm holding the baguette. Frame 4 shows the right arm bringing the baguette closer to the robot's body. Frame 5 shows both arms returning to the rest position. This sequence is designed to evoke a feeling of care and appreciation for the baguette.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready to grab
right arm extends forward, reaching out gently
fingers grasp the baguette, holding it steady
the baguette is brought closer, a careful prize
both arms return to rest, baguette secured
